title: Reading and Use of English – Part 1
description: Read the text below and decide which answer (A, B, C or D) best fits each gap.

content.articleTitle: The History of the Silk Road
content.text: The Silk Road was not a single path, but (0) rather a vast network of trade routes that connected the East and the West for centuries. Established during the Han Dynasty, it (1) the exchange of goods, such as silk, spices, and precious metals. However, the Silk Road was more than just a (2) for commerce; it was also a vital channel for the spread of ideas, religions, and technologies. Travelers and merchants (3) incredible hardships, including harsh weather and dangerous terrain, to bring their products to distant markets. This interaction (4) to significant cultural blending, as different civilizations learned from one another. The decline of the Silk Road began with the (5) of sea routes, which offered a faster and safer alternative for global trade. Despite its eventual disappearance, the legacy of this ancient network (6) on in the modern world. It (7) as a powerful symbol of human interconnectedness and the importance of cross-cultural dialogue. Today, many of the cities that once (8) along these routes are being revitalized as part of new international initiatives to promote trade and cooperation across the Eurasian continent, reminding us that the spirit of the Silk Road continues to inspire our shared global future.

example.explanation: “Rather” is used here to introduce a more accurate description of the network.

questions.explanation: “Facilitated” is a formal verb meaning to make an action or process easier.
“Conduit” is a formal word for a channel through which something is transmitted.
“Endured hardships” is a standard collocation for surviving difficult conditions.
“Led to” is the correct phrasal verb meaning to result in a particular outcome.
“The rise of” is a common way to describe something becoming more important or successful.
“Lives on” is a phrasal verb meaning to continue to exist after the original thing is gone.
“Serves as a symbol” is a fixed formal collocation.
“Flourished” means to develop or grow rapidly and successfully, often used for cities.
